description: Completely remove deprecated features — merge/similarity/keyword system and the Board (XYFlow canvas) — from both backend and frontend. This creates a clean codebase for the subsequent rename and new feature additions.

userStories.title: [Backend] Remove merge/similarity/keyword system
userStories.description: As a developer, I want to completely remove the merge, similarity detection, keyword extraction, and append features from all backend services so that the codebase is clean for refactoring.
acceptanceCriteria: All merge/similarity/keyword backend code removed from core, gateway, AI, and notification services
All merge/similarity test files removed
Database migration created to drop tables: idea_keywords, merge_requests, idea_embeddings
Database migration created to remove columns from ideas table: merged_from_idea_1_id, merged_from_idea_2_id, closed_by_merge_id, closed_by_append_id, co_owner_id
research_similar_ideas tool removed from Facilitator agent
All backend services start without errors
grep verification passes: no merge/similarity/keyword references remain in services/ (excluding migrations)
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes:
Architecture: docs/02-architecture/data-model.md § idea_keywords, merge_requests, idea_embeddings, ideas — DROP tables and columns
Architecture: docs/02-architecture/api-design.md § /api/ideas/:id/similar, /api/ideas/:id/merge-request, /api/merge-request/:id/consent — REMOVE endpoints
Architecture: docs/02-architecture/project-structure.md § Microservice Decomposition — verify all services after deletion
AI: docs/03-ai/tools-and-functions.md § research_similar_ideas tool — REMOVE from Facilitator plugin
Testing: No test-matrix entries for removal stories (scaffolding-type work) — implement-first workflow
Files: services/core/apps/similarity/, services/gateway/apps/similarity/, services/ai/agents/keyword_agent/, services/ai/agents/deep_comparison/, services/ai/agents/merge_synthesizer/, services/ai/embedding/idea_embedder.py, services/gateway/events/merge_consumer.py, services/notification/consumers/similarity_events.py, services/ai/agents/facilitator/plugins.py, services/ai/agents/facilitator/prompt.py, proto/core.proto
Gotchas: This story has the widest blast radius — touches core, gateway, AI, notification services and proto files. Be systematic: delete directories first, then remove references from remaining files. Run services individually after each major deletion to verify no broken imports.
Deviations: None expected

data_model: idea_keywords: idea_id uuid FK, keywords varchar[] — DROP TABLE
merge_requests: id uuid PK, idea_1_id uuid FK, idea_2_id uuid FK, state varchar, synthesis_result text — DROP TABLE
idea_embeddings: idea_id uuid FK, embedding vector(1536) — DROP TABLE
ideas: merged_from_idea_1_id, merged_from_idea_2_id, closed_by_merge_id, closed_by_append_id, co_owner_id — DROP COLUMNS
api_endpoints: GET /api/ideas/:id/similar — returns similar ideas based on keywords/vectors — REMOVE
POST /api/merge-request/:id/consent — owner consents to merge — REMOVE
existing_code: services/core/apps/similarity/tasks.py: keyword_matching_sweep(), vector_similarity_sweep() — Celery periodic tasks
services/gateway/apps/ideas/views.py: get_similar_ideas(), create_merge_request(), consent_merge_request() — REST views

userStories.title: [Frontend] Remove merge/similarity/keyword UI
userStories.description: As a developer, I want to completely remove all merge, similarity, and append UI from the frontend so that users no longer see deprecated features.
acceptanceCriteria: All merge/similarity UI components deleted: MergeRequestBanner, MergedIdeaBanner, AppendedIdeaBanner, ManualMergeModal
Workspace simplified: merge/append logic removed from IdeaWorkspace, WorkspaceLayout, hooks
WebSocket handlers for merge events removed
Notification UI for similarity events removed
Email preference options for similarity removed
Translation keys for merge/similarity removed from en.json and de.json
grep verification passes: no merge/similarity/append references remain in frontend/src/ (excluding git-related)
Frontend builds without errors
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes:
Architecture: docs/02-architecture/api-design.md § Idea type definition — remove merge_request_pending, merged_idea_ref, appended_idea_ref fields
Design: docs/03-design/component-specs.md § MergeRequestBanner, MergedIdeaBanner, AppendedIdeaBanner — REMOVE components
Testing: No test-matrix entries for removal stories — implement-first workflow
Files: frontend/src/components/workspace/MergeRequestBanner.tsx, frontend/src/components/workspace/MergedIdeaBanner.tsx, frontend/src/components/workspace/AppendedIdeaBanner.tsx, frontend/src/components/workspace/ManualMergeModal.tsx, frontend/src/api/similarity.ts, frontend/src/pages/IdeaWorkspace/index.tsx, frontend/src/hooks/use-websocket.ts, frontend/src/i18n/locales/en.json, frontend/src/i18n/locales/de.json
Gotchas: Frontend deletions are more isolated than backend (lower blast radius). IdeaWorkspace.tsx will need simplification: remove hasMergePending/isClosedByMerge/isClosedByAppend logic and related lock conditions. Translation file updates require both en.json and de.json changes.
Deviations: None expected

components: MergeRequestBanner — displays pending merge request with accept/decline buttons — DELETE
MergedIdeaBanner — shows 'this idea was merged into X' message — DELETE
AppendedIdeaBanner — shows 'this idea was appended to X' message — DELETE
ManualMergeModal — modal for manually triggering merge — DELETE
existing_code: frontend/src/api/ideas.ts: Idea interface — merge_request_pending, merged_idea_ref, appended_idea_ref fields
frontend/src/hooks/use-websocket.ts: ws:merge_request, ws:merge_complete, ws:append_complete — event handlers

userStories.title: [Backend] Remove Board (XYFlow)
userStories.description: As a developer, I want to completely remove the board/canvas feature from backend services so that the AI pipeline no longer handles board state.
acceptanceCriteria: All board backend code removed from core, gateway, and AI services
Board references removed from WebSocket consumers
Board state assembly removed from AI pipeline
Board agent removed from AI service
Facilitator prompt cleaned: no board references, board instructions, or board state context
Summarizing AI prompt cleaned: no board state formatting
Database migration created to drop tables: board_nodes, board_connections
Proto files updated: board-related messages removed
All backend services start without errors
grep verification passes: no board references remain in services/ (excluding migrations)
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes:
Architecture: docs/02-architecture/data-model.md § board_nodes, board_connections — DROP tables
Architecture: docs/02-architecture/project-structure.md § AI service framework — verify AI pipeline after board agent removal
AI: docs/03-ai/system-prompts.md § Facilitator prompt — remove <board_references>, <board_instructions_guidance>, <board_state> sections
AI: docs/03-ai/tools-and-functions.md § request_board_changes tool — REMOVE from Facilitator plugin
Testing: No test-matrix entries for removal stories — implement-first workflow
Files: services/core/apps/board/, services/gateway/apps/board/, services/ai/agents/board_agent/, services/gateway/apps/websocket/consumers.py, services/ai/agents/facilitator/plugins.py, services/ai/agents/facilitator/prompt.py, services/ai/processing/pipeline.py, services/ai/agents/summarizing_ai/prompt.py, proto/core.proto
Gotchas: This story touches the AI pipeline significantly — removing board state assembly and board agent invocation. The Facilitator prompt currently has [[Item Title]] board reference syntax in the send_chat_message tool description — remove that too. Pipeline.py may have board-specific context assembly that needs to be stripped out.
Deviations: None expected

data_model: board_nodes: id uuid PK, idea_id uuid FK, node_type varchar, position_x int, position_y int, title text, content text — DROP TABLE
board_connections: id uuid PK, idea_id uuid FK, source_node_id uuid FK, target_node_id uuid FK — DROP TABLE
api_endpoints: GET/POST/PATCH/DELETE /api/ideas/:id/board/* — all board CRUD operations — REMOVE
ai_specs: Board Agent — managed board state, 8 tools for board manipulation — DELETE entire agent
Facilitator: request_board_changes tool — allowed Facilitator to request board updates — REMOVE tool
Facilitator prompt: <board_state> context block — provided board nodes/connections to AI — REMOVE section
existing_code: services/ai/processing/pipeline.py: board state assembly step — loads nodes/connections for AI context
services/ai/agents/facilitator/prompt.py: [[Item Title]] syntax — references board items in chat

userStories.title: [Frontend] Remove Board (XYFlow) UI
userStories.description: As a developer, I want to completely remove the board/canvas UI and XYFlow dependency from the frontend so that the workspace shows chat only.
acceptanceCriteria: All board UI components deleted
WorkspaceLayout updated to render chat only (full width) — no right panel for now
@xyflow/react dependency removed from package.json
Board WebSocket handlers removed
Board Redux slices removed (if any)
Board translation keys removed from en.json and de.json
grep verification passes: no xyflow/ReactFlow/board references remain in frontend/src/
Frontend builds without errors
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes:
Architecture: docs/02-architecture/project-structure.md § Frontend structure — verify workspace layout after board removal
Design: docs/03-design/component-specs.md § Board canvas components — REMOVE all board-related components
Design: docs/03-design/page-layouts.md § Workspace layout — will become chat-only temporarily (structured panel comes in M19)
Testing: No test-matrix entries for removal stories — implement-first workflow
Files: frontend/src/components/board/, frontend/src/pages/IdeaWorkspace/index.tsx, frontend/src/components/workspace/WorkspaceLayout.tsx, frontend/src/hooks/use-websocket.ts, frontend/src/i18n/locales/en.json, frontend/src/i18n/locales/de.json, frontend/package.json
Gotchas: WorkspaceLayout currently renders chat + board side-by-side. For M17, make it render chat only (full width). The structured requirements panel is added later in M19. Remove ReactFlowProvider import. After removing @xyflow/react, run npm install to update package-lock.json.
Deviations: WorkspaceLayout will temporarily be chat-only (no right panel). The structured requirements panel comes in M19, so this is an expected intermediate state.
